topic: GitHub PR and issue management via CLI
description: Manages GitHub pull requests and issues using gh CLI through system-actuator. Lists PRs, reviews code changes, adds comments, approves or requests changes, and merges PRs.

steps_hint: List open PRs with gh pr list
View PR details and diff with gh pr view and gh pr diff
Review and comment with gh pr review
Merge with gh pr merge if approved
use_cases: コードレビューとコメント
hints._comment: Pattern B: gh CLI authentication may require initial human setup, then subsequent operations are fully automated.
